interpretation.statistical_constraint: County annual fertilizer use for all agriculture.
interpretation.crop_allocation: The observed share assigned to wheat and maize is unknown. The annual wheat-plus-maize share of total crop sown area is calculated as an area-proportional reference; additional fixed shares are sensitivity assumptions only.
interpretation.temporal_split: Sowing and topdress fractions are management assumptions independent of the county annual total.
interpretation.compound_fertilizer: The yearbook reports total nutrient-equivalent compound fertilizer, not its nitrogen component; nitrogen fraction is therefore uncertain.
interpretation.reference_status: The existing 180 kg N/ha per wheat season and per maize season is only a previous test scenario. It is retained for reproducibility, not treated as a target, requirement, observation, or optimization constraint.
interpretation.model_scope: The current APSIM template has SoilN but no SoilP profile/module and no potassium limitation module. N can affect simulated yield; P2O5 and K2O statistics are retained for management diagnostics but are not injected into the current model.

forbidden_uses: Treating the county total as wheat-only or maize-only fertilizer
Treating all nutrient-equivalent compound fertilizer as nitrogen
Inferring sowing/topdress timing from an annual fertilizer-use table
Calling a sensitivity-derived rate an observed management record
